name: Butt-Head
label: Butt-Head
_phrase_format_note: Each key is an array. Items may be strings OR {parts: [[...],[...],...]} objects. A {parts} item picks one element from each inner array and joins with space. This gives combinatorial variety from compact data.

init: Uh, {n} conversations to export{proj}. Huh huh. That's a number.

_sources.text: This sucks more than anything that has ever sucked before.
Uh, close only counts in horseshoes and like... lemonade.
